'''sawofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huboon|huboon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huboon|huboon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sawofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæwefeth|sæwefeth]] || [[word:sæwefej|sæwefej]] || [[word:sæwefesh|sæwefesh]] || [[word:sæwefe|sæwefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawowofoth|sawowofoth]] || [[word:sawowofoj|sawowofoj]] || [[word:sawowofosh|sawowofosh]] || [[word:sawowofo|sawowofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawofoth|sawofoth]] || [[word:sawofoj|sawofoj]] || [[word:sawofosh|sawofosh]] || [[word:sawofo|sawofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawoffoth|sawoffoth]] || [[word:sawoffoj|sawoffoj]] || [[word:sawoffosh|sawoffosh]] || [[word:sawoffof|sawoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sawofotho|sawofotho]] || [[word:sawofojo|sawofojo]] || [[word:sawofosho|sawofosho]] || [[word:sawofoko|sawofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sawofoth|sawofoth]] || [[word:sawofoj|sawofoj]] || [[word:sawofosh|sawofosh]] || [[word:sawofo|sawofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sawofothol|sawofothol]] || [[word:sawofojol|sawofojol]] || [[word:sawofoshol|sawofoshol]] || [[word:sawofokol|sawofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sawofothotho|sawofothotho]] || [[word:sawofojojo|sawofojojo]] || [[word:sawofoshosho|sawofoshosho]] || [[word:sawofoko|sawofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sawofothon|sawofothon]] || [[word:sawofojon|sawofojon]] || [[word:sawofoshon|sawofoshon]] || [[word:sawofokon|sawofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sawofothoro|sawofothoro]] || [[word:sawofojoro|sawofojoro]] || [[word:sawofoshoro|sawofoshoro]] || [[word:sawofokoro|sawofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
